NKJV.1: Praise  the LORD! Praise God in His sanctuary; Praise Him in His mighty firmament!
NKJV.2: Praise Him for His mighty acts; Praise Him according to His excellent greatness!
NKJV.3: Praise Him with the sound of the trumpet; Praise Him with the lute and harp!
NKJV.4: Praise Him with the timbrel and dance; Praise Him with stringed instruments and flutes!
NKJV.5: Praise Him with loud cymbals; Praise Him with clashing cymbals!
NKJV.6: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD. Praise the LORD!

ESV.1: Praise the LORD! Praise God in his sanctuary; praise him in his mighty heavens!
ESV.2: Praise him for his mighty deeds; praise him according to his excellent greatness!
ESV.3: Praise him with trumpet sound; praise him with lute and harp!
ESV.4: Praise him with tambourine and dance; praise him with strings and pipe!
ESV.5: Praise him with sounding cymbals; praise him with loud clashing cymbals!
ESV.6: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD! Praise the LORD!

NASB.1: Praise the LORD! Praise God in His sanctuary; Praise Him in His mighty expanse.
NASB.2: Praise Him for His mighty deeds; Praise Him according to His excellent greatness.
NASB.3: Praise Him with trumpet sound; Praise Him with harp and lyre.
NASB.4: Praise Him with timbrel and dancing; Praise Him with stringed instruments and pipe.
NASB.5: Praise Him with loud cymbals; Praise Him with resounding cymbals.
NASB.6: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD. Praise the LORD!

NLT.1:
Praise the LORD!
Praise God in his sanctuary;
praise him in his mighty heaven!
NLT.2:
Praise him for his mighty works;
praise his unequaled greatness!
NLT.3:
Praise him with a blast of the ram’s horn;
praise him with the lyre and harp!
NLT.4:
Praise him with the tambourine and dancing;
praise him with strings and flutes!
NLT.5:
Praise him with a clash of cymbals;
praise him with loud clanging cymbals.
NLT.6:
Let everything that breathes sing praises to the LORD!
Praise the LORD!

WEB.1: Praise Yah! Praise God in his sanctuary! Praise him in his heavens for his acts of power!
WEB.2: Praise him for his mighty acts! Praise him according to his excellent greatness!
WEB.3: Praise him with the sounding of the trumpet! Praise him with harp and lyre!
WEB.4: Praise him with tambourine and dancing! Praise him with stringed instruments and flute!
WEB.5: Praise him with loud cymbals! Praise him with resounding cymbals!
WEB.6: Let everything that has breath praise Yah! Praise Yah!

AMP.1:
Praise the LORD!
Praise God in His sanctuary;
Praise Him in His mighty heavens.
AMP.2:
Praise Him for His mighty acts;
Praise Him according to [the abundance of] His greatness.
AMP.3:
Praise Him with trumpet sound;
Praise Him with harp and lyre.
AMP.4:
Praise Him with tambourine and dancing;
Praise Him with stringed instruments and flute.
AMP.5:
Praise Him with resounding cymbals;
Praise Him with loud cymbals.
AMP.6:
Let everything that has breath and every breath of life praise the LORD!
Praise the LORD! (Hallelujah!)

MSG.1:
Hallelujah!
Praise God in his holy house of worship,
praise him under the open skies;
MSG.2:
Praise him for his acts of power,
praise him for his magnificent greatness;
MSG.3:
Praise with a blast on the trumpet,
praise by strumming soft strings;
MSG.4:
Praise him with castanets and dance,
praise him with banjo and flute;
MSG.5:
Praise him with cymbals and a big bass drum,
praise him with fiddles and mandolin.
MSG.6:
Let every living, breathing creature praise God!
Hallelujah!

NIV.1:
Psalm 150
Praise the Lord.
Praise God in his sanctuary;
praise him in his mighty heavens.
NIV.2:
Praise him for his acts of power;
praise him for his surpassing greatness.
NIV.3:

praise him with the strings and flute,

praise him with the clash of cymbals,

NET.1: Praise the LORD! Praise God in his sanctuary! Praise him in the sky, which testifies to his strength!
NET.2: Praise him for his mighty acts! Praise him for his surpassing greatness!
NET.3: Praise him with the blast of the horn! Praise him with the lyre and the harp!
NET.4: Praise him with the tambourine and with dancing! Praise him with stringed instruments and the flute!
NET.5: Praise him with loud cymbals! Praise him with clanging cymbals!
NET.6: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD! Praise the LORD!
